name: rescue-lifeboat
description: NFT rescue tool for compromised EVM wallets. Free. Open source. No percentage. No catch.
author: Kane Mayfield <kanemayfield.com>

_notes.torus-version: Pinned to v6.x. v7+ changed retrieveShares() signature. Do not upgrade without updating markv-engine.js unvault flow.
_notes.ethers-version: Must stay on v6.x. v5 has different API for JsonRpcProvider, wallet, BigInt handling.
